## News


# Mr Alex Phil (previously known as Alexei Filatov) (Date of Birth 2 February 1966) of Veranda U’dachi, Route Isabelle, St Peter Port, Guernsey, GY1 1QR

- Prohibitions
Date of prohibition order pursuant to section 33 of The Financial Services Business (Enforcement Powers) (Bailiwick of Guernsey) Law, 2020 and prohibited functions:
From 18 July 2025 until 18 May 2028: holding a supervised role.
